status.description: complete = finished normally; partial = stopped early with more likely remaining; blocked = could not proceed

reason.description: One short line. Required for partial/blocked; '' is acceptable for complete.

trustworthy.description: Auditor only: true if the file is free of the specialty's concerns; false if any concern was reported or strongly suspected. Scouts may omit.

summary.description: Auditor only: one-line verdict on the file (<=200 chars). Scouts may omit.
